project_context.target_audience: Professionals, entrepreneurs, and freelancers in Ivory Coast and Francophone Africa
project_context.brand_persona: Accessible luxury, refined, authoritative, high-end, modern

headings.description: Used for all H1, H2, and premium display texts. Brings elegance and editorial luxury.

body.description: Used for body text, inputs, labels, and micro-copy. Clean, geometric, highly legible.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Standard section padding: py-24 or py-32. Container padding: px-6 lg:px-12.

grids.marketing: Use Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) for services. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8).
grids.dashboard: Use Control Room Grid for the admin interface. Compact, dense, gap-6.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/60 border-b border-white/5
surfaces.cards: Dark Charcoal (#111111) with 1px border-white/5. Hover: -translate-y-1 with subtle Champagne Gold glow.
surfaces.vip_card: Tracing Beam aesthetic: Subtle glowing border using #E6C9A8 to denote the highest premium tier.

component_strategy.marketing_pages: Pure HTML/Tailwind for hero, bento grids, and storytelling. Avoid rigid Shadcn cards for display sections.
component_strategy.forms_and_checkout: Use Shadcn/UI (Input, Select, Form, Tabs) but heavily override styles to match luxury theme (e.g., bg-[#111111] border-white/10 focus:ring-[#E6C9A8]).
component_strategy.admin_dashboard: Cardless, dense layout. Use Shadcn Table, Dialog, and Dropdown for order management.
component_strategy.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-[#E6C9A8] text-[#050505] font-semibold hover:bg-[#D4B895] transition-all. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#E6C9A8].

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling (momentum scrolling).
motion_and_interactions.reveals: Staggered fade-up (Framer Motion) for bento grid items and list entries.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Text color shifts slightly, images scale slightly (1.02) within overflow-hidden containers.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure 4.5:1 text contrast minimum.

hero_background.description: Cinematic wide-angle shot of a sophisticated African businessman in a tailored dark suit. Use in the main Hero section with a heavy dark gradient overlay (from-[#050505] to-transparent) on the left side to ensure text readability.

texture_background.description: Abstract dark luxury texture with champagne gold light bleeding. Use as background for the Pricing/Services section or the multi-step form.

service_business_card.description: Premium matte black metallic NFC digital business card resting on a dark marble surface. Use in the Services Bento Grid.

service_digital_cv.description: Elegant smartphone screen mockup showing digital presence. Use for Digital CV/Portfolio feature blocks.

testimonial_1.description: Man in black suit jacket. African professional portrait for testimonial section.

testimonial_2.description: Elegant African businesswoman in a chic neutral-toned blazer. Testimonial/Success story feature.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Cormorant Garamond and Outfit fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling at the root level.
Build the multi-step form for placing orders using Shadcn Forms/Tabs, restyling them drastically to fit the #111111 dark theme with gold #E6C9A8 accents.
The Hero section must use 'hero_background' with a heavy left-to-right gradient overlay (#050505 to transparent) to ensure the white and gold text pops perfectly.
For the Service Catalog, implement a Bento Grid layout (asymmetrical) rather than a boring row of identical cards. The VIP Pack should span wider and have a subtle gold glowing border.
Implement an admin route (`/admin`) using Shadcn tables and data visualization to manage orders. This section should have a pure utilitarian 'Control Room' grid layout.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Never use purely transparent headers if content scrolls beneath them; use the specified Crystal Glassmorphism settings.
